info.title: Top GUN GEO-Lens API
info.description: Professional auditing for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). Measures brand visibility and citations in LLM search results.
info.x-guidance: This API audits brand and topic visibility across Large Language Models. Call GET /api/v1/audit?query=<brand> to receive a visibility score (0-100), top citation URLs, LLM index status, and actionable GEO recommendations. Payment of $1.50 USD is required per request via Stripe MPP. If no X-Payment-Token header is provided, the server returns HTTP 402 with a Stripe payment_intent. Complete payment, then retry with the X-Payment-Token header set to the payment_intent_id.

servers.description: Production server managed by Wilfred L. Lee Jr.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The brand or topic to audit for LLM visibility
